calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2017 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement As To Alfresco Home Llc
Off Calendar Apr-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement as to defendant Alfresco Home, LLC is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2017 Set For Trial On Dec-11-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
